decision.rationale: The plate is visually consistent with the character's design style but contains direct contradictions to the text of two cited identity rules. First, under IR.claude-mascot.proportion.rounded-box-silhouette, the rule specifies that the body is slightly taller than wide (~1:1.2 width:height), whereas in this plate, the box reads as wider than tall (approx 1.4:1 width:height ratio in perspective). Second, under IR.claude-mascot.face.two-dot-eyes-with-brows, the rule specifies that the eyes are 'roughly one eye-width apart at their inner edges', but the plate depicts them much wider apart (approx 8-10 eye-widths apart). The other rules are fully honored: the construction cross-line (IR.claude-mascot.face.construction-cross-line) is faint and correctly placed; the mouth is absent (IR.claude-mascot.face.minimal-mouth-line), which satisfies the 'at most a small, short mouth line' criteria; the terracotta palette (IR.claude-mascot.palette.terracotta-orange-body) is respected with flat fill and correct shadow tones; and the hand-drawn warm graphite line and cross-hatched shading style (IR.claude-mascot.style.warm-graphite-line-cross-hatch) are correctly implemented.
